title: Kimura® Pro Telescopic Garden Shears - Premium Hedge Shears, Patented Gearing Technology, Lightweight Extendable Aluminium Handles, Japanese SK5 Steel Blades, Heavy Duty Gardening Shears - 630-820mm
features: [SHARP & PRECISE] - The sharp Japanese SK5 steel blades ensure precision cutting and long-lasting sharpness. Ideal for both shaping and clearing hedges and shrubs with minimal effort.
[ EASILY EXTENDABLE ] - These telescopic garden shears have easy-twist locks that allow you to effortlessly extend the handles from 630mm to 820mm, so you can reach tree branches that are high-up.

[ERGONOMIC DESIGN] - The lightweight aluminium handles feature soft TPR grips for enhanced comfort, control and safety. The even distribution of weight between the blades and handles makes it easy for anyone to hold these garden shears.
[LOW FRICTION] - PTFE coating help the blades glide through plants without sap build-up or rusting, allowing for a smooth cut every time.
[EASY TO USE] - Patented gearing technology gives you up to 3x more power on every cut whilst reducing strain on hands and arms when gardening.
[MADE TO LAST] - Tough steel construction with anti-rust components and riveted handles guarantee a durable product that is sure to stand the test of time.
[VERSATILE] – The hedge shear blades are also wavy which assist with cutting larger stems up to 25mm in diameter.

[LIFETIME WARRANTY] - We are so confident in the quality of our hedge shears that a lifetime warranty is included in your purchase. If for any reason you are unsatisfied with your purchase, simply contact us and we will make it right.
description: From the brand Previous page We are Kimura, a small UK business that specialises in the supply of premium products including Kitchen Knives, Garden Tools and more. All products are premium quality with added features & benefits to provide customers with something that works better, lasts longer and makes for an all-round superior customer experience.
